text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One night, when I go to check the<n>track
conditions...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear metallic clanging coming from<n>
somewhere... I look in the direction of<n>the sound
and see Mihono Bourbon<n>running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Test concluded. All conditions within<n>acceptable
parameters. Load increase<n>confirmed to be safe.
Optimal weight<n>calculated at...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she stands there after her run, I<n>glance at her
feet and see what look<n>to be extremely heavy
weights tied<n>around her ankles.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These are custom-made ankle<n>weights meant to
increase resistance<n>during training.
choice_data_list: They're kind of noisy for this late at night...
They're kind of noisy for this late at night...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These are custom-made ankle<n>weights meant to
increase resistance<n>during training.
choice_data_list: They're kind of noisy for this late at night...
They're kind of noisy for this late at night...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The weights pose no issue. Based on<n>my
previous assessments, doubling<n>this load will still
fall within an<n>acceptable range.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will continue to calculate the most<n>optimal mass
limit for me. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I watch Mihono Bourbon as she runs<n>off with
ease, despite having adding<n>more weights to her
ankles.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Concern acknowledged. Auditory<n>disturbances
from nocturnal practice<n>sessions could negatively
impact the<n>surrounding area.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My sincere apologies. I was unaware<n>of the
noise issues. Thank you for<n>bringing this
information to my<n>attention.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Going forward, I shall take<n>appropriate
measures, such as<n>adjusting my practice hours,
to<n>ensure I do not disturb others during<n>training.
